recommendations.action: Minor: at 1024x768 (tablet-landscape) the 'CORE // ONLINE' label still bleeds slightly into the LinkedIn link area at the bottom of contact. Bump the @media query in SvgCoreFallback.tsx from `(max-width: 640px)` to `(max-width: 1024px)` to also hide the badge at tablet-landscape. NON-BLOCKING for convergence.
Mobile orb fade currently goes from 1.0 to 0.15 with 0.85 multiplier. Consider increasing fade depth to 0.95 multiplier so background is even cleaner on small viewports. NON-BLOCKING.

summary: CONVERGED. Desktop LH 99 (target 90, +9). Mobile LH 97 (target 75, +22). E2E 18/18 across chromium/firefox/webkit at 6 viewports. Visual 88/100 (target 80, +8) with mobile sub-scores 80/82, tablet 86-92, desktop 94-95. Critical path issues resolved: dual R3F Canvas removed, Three.js code-split off mobile bundle, GLTF material clones, Lenis disabled on iOS+Firefox, 17 GSAP plugins reduced to 4, splitChars wraps words atomically, contact heading bug fixed, mobile orb fade implemented. Remaining items are minor polish that does not block convergence.
